# Zabbix Query

## Overview

gSage AI ‚Äî Zabbix read-only query tool.

## Tool

| Tool | Summary | Permissions | Requires approval | Core |
| --- | --- | --- | :---: | :---: |
| `zabbix_query` | Query Zabbix monitoring: host inventory, active problems, metric history, health snapshots and maintenance windows | `zabbix:read` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |

## Configuration

> The JSON below goes into the **configtool model** in the web UI (per organisation; can also be scoped to a department).

> **Multiple profiles supported** ‚Äî you may create more than one config row per organisation, each with a distinct `profile_id`. The agent picks one via the `config_profile` parameter at call time. State, rate limits and circuit-breaker counters are isolated per profile.

> **Sensitive fields** (api keys / passwords / tokens) are *omitted* from the JSON below ‚Äî set them via environment variables (see the _Environment variables_ table) or directly in the encrypted DB row from the web UI.

### Empty configtool template (required fields only)

```json
{
  "url": "<value>"
}
```

### Example configtool model

```json
{
  "skip_version_check": false,
  "timeout": 30,
  "url": "<value>",
  "username": "<value>",
  "verify_tls": true
}
```

### Field reference

| Field | Type | Required | Sensitive | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | :---: | :---: | --- | --- |
| `password` | `string` | ‚Äî | ‚úì | ‚Äî | Zabbix password (used together with 'username'). |
| `skip_version_check` | `boolean` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | `false` | Skip zabbix-utils API version compatibility check (default: false). Enable for Zabbix 8.x or other versions newer than what the library has been tested with. |
| `timeout` | `integer` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | `30` | HTTP request timeout in seconds (default: 30). |
| `token` | `string` | ‚Äî | ‚úì | ‚Äî | Zabbix API token (preferred auth method). Generated in User settings ‚Üí API tokens. |
| `url` | `string` | ‚úì | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Zabbix frontend URL (e.g. https://zabbix.example.com). Must be accessible from the mcp-server container. |
| `username` | `string` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Zabbix username (used when 'token' is not set). |
| `verify_tls` | `boolean` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | `true` | Verify the server TLS certificate (default: true). |

## Environment variables

The variables below are derived automatically from each tool's `config_schema`. Set them in your `.env` (or via your secrets backend) to seed defaults for every organisation. **Per-org DB config takes precedence over env vars.**

| Variable | Maps to field | Type | Default | Sensitive | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
| `TOOL_ZABBIX_QUERY__PASSWORD` | `password` | `string` | ‚Äî | ‚úì | Zabbix password (used together with 'username'). |
| `TOOL_ZABBIX_QUERY__SKIP_VERSION_CHECK` | `skip_version_check` | `boolean` | `false` | ‚Äî | Skip zabbix-utils API version compatibility check (default: false). Enable for Zabbix 8.x or other versions newer than what the library has been tested with. |
| `TOOL_ZABBIX_QUERY__TIMEOUT` | `timeout` | `integer` | `30` | ‚Äî | HTTP request timeout in seconds (default: 30). |
| `TOOL_ZABBIX_QUERY__TOKEN` | `token` | `string` | ‚Äî | ‚úì | Zabbix API token (preferred auth method). Generated in User settings ‚Üí API tokens. |
| `TOOL_ZABBIX_QUERY__URL` | `url` | `string` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Zabbix frontend URL (e.g. https://zabbix.example.com). Must be accessible from the mcp-server container. |
| `TOOL_ZABBIX_QUERY__USERNAME` | `username` | `string` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Zabbix username (used when 'token' is not set). |
| `TOOL_ZABBIX_QUERY__VERIFY_TLS` | `verify_tls` | `boolean` | `true` | ‚Äî | Verify the server TLS certificate (default: true). |

## Operations

### `zabbix_query`

- **`hosts_list`** ‚Äî _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `hostid` | `string` | ‚Äî | Zabbix internal host ID. Use hosts_list to discover hostid values from a name or IP. |
  | `host` | `string` | ‚Äî | Filter hosts by technical name (partial match). Used with hosts_list and templates_list. |
  | `host_name` | `string` | ‚Äî | Filter hosts by visible/display name (partial match). Used with hosts_list. |
  | `ip` | `string` | ‚Äî | Filter hosts by IP address (exact match). Used with hosts_list. |

- **`host_details`** ‚Äî _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `hostid` | `string` | ‚Äî | Zabbix internal host ID. Use hosts_list to discover hostid values from a name or IP. |
  | `hostids` | `array` | ‚Äî | List of Zabbix host IDs (use instead of hostid when multiple). |
  | `host` | `string` | ‚Äî | Filter hosts by technical name (partial match). Used with hosts_list and templates_list. |
  | `host_name` | `string` | ‚Äî | Filter hosts by visible/display name (partial match). Used with hosts_list. |
  | `ip` | `string` | ‚Äî | Filter hosts by IP address (exact match). Used with hosts_list. |
  | `groupid` | `string` | ‚Äî | Zabbix host group ID. Used with hosts_in_group. |
  | `groupids` | `array` | ‚Äî | List of host group IDs. Used with problems_list, events_list. |
  | `group_name` | `string` | ‚Äî | Filter host groups by name (partial match). Used with hostgroups_list. |
  | `itemids` | `array` | ‚Äî | List of item IDs to retrieve history for. Run action=items_list first to discover valid item IDs. |
  | `item_key` | `string` | ‚Äî | Filter items by key_ (partial match). Example: 'cpu', 'memory', 'vfs.fs'. Used with items_list. |
  | `item_name` | `string` | ‚Äî | Filter items by display name (partial match). Used with items_list. |
  | `history_type` | `string` | ‚Äî | Item value type for metric_history. Use 'float' for numeric gauges (CPU, memory), 'integer' for counters, 'character'/'text'/'log' for string values. Default: 'float'. |
  | `time_from` | `integer` | ‚Äî | Start of time range as Unix timestamp. |
  | `time_till` | `integer` | ‚Äî | End of time range as Unix timestamp. |
  | `severities` | `array` | ‚Äî | Severity codes to include: 0=not_classified, 1=info, 2=warning, 3=average, 4=high, 5=disaster. |
  | `min_severity` | `integer` | ‚Äî | Minimum severity to include (inclusive). Shorthand for severities=[min_severity..5]. |
  | `recent` | `boolean` | ‚Äî | When true, return only recent problems (still active or suppressed). Default: true for problems_list. |
  | `only_true` | `boolean` | ‚Äî | Return only currently firing triggers (triggers_list only). |
  | `limit` | `integer` | ‚Äî | Maximum number of records to return. Default: 100 for list actions; 100 for metric_history. Max: 500 for list actions; 1000 for metric_history. |

- **`hostgroups_list`** ‚Äî _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `group_name` | `string` | ‚Äî | Filter host groups by name (partial match). Used with hostgroups_list. |

- **`hosts_in_group`** ‚Äî _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `groupid` | `string` | ‚Äî | Zabbix host group ID. Used with hosts_in_group. |

- **`templates_list`** ‚Äî _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `host` | `string` | ‚Äî | Filter hosts by technical name (partial match). Used with hosts_list and templates_list. |

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `itemids` | `array` | ‚Äî | List of item IDs to retrieve history for. Run action=items_list first to discover valid item IDs. |
  | `item_key` | `string` | ‚Äî | Filter items by key_ (partial match). Example: 'cpu', 'memory', 'vfs.fs'. Used with items_list. |
  | `item_name` | `string` | ‚Äî | Filter items by display name (partial match). Used with items_list. |
